title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cyient - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cyient - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cyient, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
